name: AWS EC2 Instance Connect Attempt via Serial Console
description: This model monitors attempts to push an SSH public key to a specified EC2 instance to establish a serial console connection to the instance using SSH, a potential pathway for lateral movement within networks. Alerts indicate administrative actions or troubleshooting. Monitoring helps prevent misuse of the serial console for unauthorized access or lateral movement, enhancing EC2 instance and cloud environment security.

rules.name: AWS EC2 Instance Connect via Serial Console

author: Srivathsa H S and Sunil Bharti
